## Summary
<!-- Brief description of changes -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Bug fix (script, template, or reference)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure/CI change

## Checklist
- [ ] Skill name matches directory name
- [ ] YAML frontmatter has all required fields (name, description, license, metadata)
- [ ] Subdomain is one of the 20 valid values
- [ ] Description is under 1024 characters
- [ ] No placeholder text (TODO, TBD, [insert], example.com, PLACEHOLDER)
- [ ] All regulatory citations are accurate (verified against official text)
- [ ] Enforcement precedents have real case names and fine amounts
- [ ] Python script runs without errors (python3 -m py_compile scripts/process.py)
- [ ] Template in assets/ is fully filled with realistic data
- [ ] Tested with at least one AI agent (Claude Code, Copilot, etc.)

<!-- List any jurisdictions this skill covers -->
